name: COMFYCLAW: Self-Evolving Skill Harnesses (2607.01709)
content: Agents are increasingly used to construct workflows and assist humans in completing recurring tasks more efficiently. As these workflows become repeated and domain-specific, agent memory and reusable skills become increasingly important: agents should be able to recall workflow patterns, execution constraints, and user preferences from previous runs. We study this problem in workflow-based image generation and introduce COMFYCLAW, an agentic skill evolution harness for controlling ComfyUI workfl
field: 记忆系统/自反层/进化引擎
summary: COMFYCLAW通过引入一种基于类型图编辑的工作流构建方法，结合区域级视觉语言模型验证器，实现了在图像生成任务中的最佳性能，并显著优于仅依赖验证器的基线。
key_insights: COMFYCLAW通过技能进化机制提高了代理的可靠性和性能。
COMFYCLAW利用视觉语言模型验证器将视觉失败转化为可操作的修复建议，从而提高工作流构建的质量。
COMFYCLAW在多个基准测试中展示了其在图像生成任务中的优越性，并且人类标注者更偏好使用COMFYCLAW。
xihe_relevance: COMFYCLAW的工作机制可能对曦和系统的记忆系统、自反层或进化引擎有潜在价值。
